songs.title: Mr. Brightside
feed: “Mr. Brightside” by The Killers spends a 8th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Mr. Brightside” by The Killers is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 59,298,750 airplay units.

songs.title: Father Figure
feed: “Father Figure” by Taylor Swift climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 2 spots to #4.

songs.title: Reality in Motion
feed: “Reality in Motion” by Tame Impala debuts at #5 in Personal Hot 100.
“Reality in Motion” by Tame Impala is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 6,248 sales units.
“Reality in Motion” by Tame Impala is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 38,836,875 streams units.
“Reality in Motion” by Tame Impala is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 193,137 total units.
